title: clematis occidentalis var. dissecta
intro: Clematis occidentalis var. dissecta, commonly known as Western Mountain Clematis or Cut-leaved Clematis, is a flowering vine native to the mountainous regions of western North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat various health issues such as wounds, fever, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Clematis occidentalis var. dissecta include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are typically used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
